name: tsoft-agi
description: TSoft AGI — AI-driven development memory hub. Auto-collect every turn, curate, supply context.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-collect & curate every AI-driven turn into Project Memory.
interface.longDescription: TSoft AGI is a Project Memory Harness for AI-driven development. This plugin gives external AI tools (Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, ...) cross-platform skills to install the agent, write project charters, pull reminder packs, and review commit candidates — all from chat. Backend: https://erp.t-soft.co.kr/
defaultPrompt: Install TSoft AGI in this environment with /agi-setup.
Write the initial project charter with /agi-charter.
Pull the current Memory pack with /agi-pack.
Review candidate commits and merge with /agi-review.
